---
name: Enhancement
about: Suggest improvements or refinements to existing features
title: "[ENHANCEMENT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Is your enhancement related to a problem? Please describe.
A clear and concise description of what the limitation is with the current feature.

## Describe the improvement you'd like
A clear and concise description of the enhancement or refinement you want to happen.

## Describe alternatives you've considered
Any alternative approaches or adjustments you’ve considered.

## Benefits
Explain how this enhancement will improve the system (e.g., usability, performance, maintainability, UX consistency).

## Additional context
Add any other context, design references, or screenshots related to the enhancement here.
